asset_name: Care Popup Icons — feed, clean, pet
shared_properties: Three 8x8 icons stay compact to protect the tiny play area.
Button panel uses high-contrast navy framing for finger targeting.
Each icon keeps a single dominant silhouette for instant recognition.
differences: This file covers popup controls only.
Persistent HUD meter and status bubbles stay outside this task.

context.usage: Tap-triggered care menu shown near the lower-right corner with feed, clean, and pet actions.

icon_map: feed icon at local x=2..9 uses seed silhouette in #FFA300.
clean icon at local x=14..21 uses broom silhouette in #C2C3C7.
pet icon at local x=26..33 uses hand silhouette in #FFCCAA.
cooldown state swaps active icon fills to #5F574F while keeping panel edges stable.

shape.silhouette: 36x12 popup strip divided into three 12x12 action cells for feed, clean, and pet.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 72x12px with two 36x12 states.
Each state contains three readable 8x8 icons on a navy panel with at least 2px spacing between icon boxes.
Cooldown state visibly desaturates every icon with #5F574F while keeping silhouettes readable.
Panel fits inside the 128x128 canvas at x=92 y=104 without covering the happiness bar.
